# Bermuda LLC

> InsurTech company specializing in insurance automation for 10+ years. Bermuda empowers insurance agencies with real-time rating, agentic AI workflows, carrier data integration, and lead automation — helping agents sell more with less manual work.

**Website:** https://www.thebermuda.us
**Contact:** info@thebermuda.us | (512) 428-8740
**Location:** Dallas, TX

## Key Stats

- 1,000+ agents using Bermuda solutions
- 50,000+ monthly quotes processed
- 100,000+ active policies managed
- 40+ hours/month saved through AI automation

## Products & Solutions

- [Bermuda Rater — Rating Engine & Integration Platform](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/products.md): Real-time auto & home quote generation, API-first modular architecture, multi-state quoting, TurboRater/Direct Binding support
- [Agentic AI Solutions](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/agentic-ai.md): End-to-end AI automation for quoting, policy binding, payment processing, carrier uploads, and servicing agents
- [Carrier Downloads](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/carrier-downloads.md): Real-time policy and payment data sync from carriers, single source of truth for all policy data
- [Integrations](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/integrations.md): 30+ integrations — EverQuote, QuinStreet, QuoteWizard, NowCerts, Twilio, SendGrid, QuickBooks, Zapier, and more
- [Pricing](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/pricing.md): Basic ($249/mo), Business ($499/mo), Enterprise (custom) — all with 1-month free trial
- [FAQs](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/faqs.md): Common questions about rating, integrations, lead management, automation, and technical setup

## Guides & Resources

- [How to Create AI SEO for Your Website](https://www.thebermuda.us/docs/md/ai-seo-guide.md): Step-by-step GEO guide — llms.txt, robots.txt, markdown files, structured data
